title: cyclosorus plurifolius
intro: Cyclosorus plurifolius, also known as the many-leaved fern, is a species of plant in the family Thelypteridaceae, characterized by its multiple leaflets and creeping rhizomes. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cyclosorus plurifolius include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as acting as an expectorant to help relieve coughs and congestion. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and rhizomes are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or added to herbal remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
